title: tengine.gpu.lease.released v1
description: Emitted when a GPU lease ends, freeing the queue for the next holder. Source: /tengine/gpu. 'crash_reaped' is emitted by the reaper on behalf of a dead holder (the holder's pid is gone), distinct from a clean 'shutdown' or a cooperative 'yielded'. Pairs with the tengine.gpu.lease.granted event carrying the same fencing_token.

holder.description: Identity of the lease holder being released, source-URI style (e.g. 'tengine/interactive_pipeline_lab').

fencing_token.description: Fencing token of the released lease; matches the token from tengine.gpu.lease.granted.

reason.description: Why the lease ended: 'shutdown' clean exit, 'crash_reaped' reclaimed by the reaper after holder death, 'yielded' cooperatively given up, 'error' aborted due to a fault, 'normal_exit' clean exit reported by the gpu_verify_lock.sh wrapper (distinct producer path from the interactive_pipeline_lab binary's 'shutdown').

released_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp at which the lease was released.
